problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: The key to What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient is Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region — specifically Glial cell activation/suppression — which would help 280,000,000 people affected.
